pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage providing quick access to core tasks, featured services (including Overnight Care and Memory & Dementia Care), highlighted educational resources, and contact information. Acts as the main entry point into booking, caregiver search, care assessment, cost estimation, and booking management flows.
primary_functions: Provide entry points to key flows such as booking a visit, finding a caregiver, getting care recommendations, estimating costs, and managing bookings
Highlight main services including Overnight Care and Memory & Dementia Care with links to their detail pages
Feature links to recent or important resources (e.g., fall-prevention articles) and contact information

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "View all services" section on the homepage hero or services teaser.
Click the featured "Overnight Care" service card in the featured services section.
Click the featured "Memory & Dementia Care" service card in the featured services section.
Click the homepage CTA such as "Find a Caregiver".
Click the primary CTA button such as "Book a Visit" on the homepage.
Click the banner/button such as "Get Care Recommendations" or "Start Assessment".
Click the homepage link/button such as "Estimate My Care Costs".
Click a link such as "Manage existing booking" in the hero or support area.
Click "View all resources" under the highlighted articles list.
Click on a highlighted article card on the homepage (e.g., a fall-prevention article).
Click the "Contact us" link or phone consultation prompt in the footer/hero.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Home" header navigation link.
Accessible as the root URL or direct bookmark to index.html.

pages.name: Services Overview
pages.description: Overview of all home nursing and support services offered, grouped into clear categories. Helps users understand service types and navigate to detailed pages for specific services such as Overnight Care, Memory & Dementia Care, Post-Surgery Care, Personal Care, and more.
primary_functions: List major service categories (e.g., Overnight Care, Post-Surgery Care, Memory & Dementia Care, Personal Care, Household Support)
Link to individual service detail pages such as Overnight Care and Memory & Dementia Care
Provide brief summaries to help users choose which service detail page to explore

incoming_params.description: Optional service_type code (e.g., 'overnight_care', 'memory_dementia_care', 'post_surgery_care') used to auto-scroll or highlight a specific service category.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the "Overnight Care" card or its "Learn more" link.
Click the "Memory & Dementia Care" card or its "Learn more" link.
Click a CTA such as "Book this service" on any service card.
Click a CTA such as "Estimate cost" on a service card.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Services" header navigation link.
Accessible via the "Services Overview" footer link.
Optionally opened with a 'focus' query parameter to highlight a specific service category.

pages.name: Overnight Care Service
pages.description: Detail page for Overnight Care services, including descriptions, pricing details, and an interactive plan selection tool that supports filtering by start date, visit frequency, and nightly budget. Users can compare matching plans and request a specific overnight care plan directly from this page.
primary_functions: Explain what Overnight Care includes, who it is for, and typical visit schedules
Provide a plan calculator where users select start date, visit frequency, and budget or maximum nightly price
Display matching overnight care plans with filters and sorting (e.g., sort by Price: Low to High)
Allow users to request a specific overnight care plan via a 'Request Plan' call-to-action and show an on-page confirmation

incoming_params.description: Optional ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) used to prefill the plan calculator start date.
Optional visit frequency code such as 'three_nights_per_week' to preselect frequency.
Optional maximum nightly budget used to prefill the budget filter.
Optional sort order for plans (e.g., 'price_asc', 'price_desc', 'popular').

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Overnight Care" footer link.
Accessible from the Services Overview and Home featured services sections.
Can be opened with optional query parameters to preconfigure the plan calculator.

pages.name: Memory & Dementia Care Service
pages.description: Detail page for Memory & Dementia Care, outlining the care approach and listing structured dementia care packages. Users can select packages that meet visit-frequency needs (e.g., 3+ visits/week), compare two packages side by side, identify the cheaper option, and choose a start date before proceeding to next steps.
primary_functions: Describe Memory & Dementia Care approach, scope, and visit patterns
List dementia care packages with key attributes such as visits per week and monthly price
Allow users to select two packages with at least 3 visits per week for side-by-side comparison within a comparison view on the same page
Enable users to choose the cheaper package from the comparison and schedule a start date (e.g., April 1, 2026) before continuing to the next steps

incoming_params.description: Optional minimum visits per week used to prefilter visible dementia care packages.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Continue" after selecting the cheaper package and choosing a start date.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Memory & Dementia Care" footer link.
Accessible from the Services Overview and Home featured services sections.
Optional 'minVisitsPerWeek' parameter can be used to highlight higher-frequency packages.

pages.name: Find a Caregiver
pages.description: Search and filter directory of individual caregivers and nurses. Users can search by ZIP code and radius, refine results using filters such as language, experience, and rating, and maintain a shortlist of favorite caregivers.
primary_functions: Provide a location search field (e.g., ZIP code input) and distance/radius filter for narrowing caregivers near a specific area
Offer advanced filters such as Languages (e.g., Spanish), Experience (e.g., 5+ years), and minimum Rating (e.g., 4.5 stars)
Display a results list of caregivers with key profile details, ratings, distance, and language skills
Allow users to favorite or save caregivers directly from the results list to build a shortlist

incoming_params.description: Optional ZIP code to prefill the location search (e.g., '94105').
Optional radius in miles for initial distance filter (e.g., 10).
Optional language code (e.g., 'spanish') used to preselect language filter.
Optional minimum years of experience filter (e.g., 5).
Optional minimum rating filter (e.g., 4.5).
Optional view mode (e.g., 'favorites') to show only favorited caregivers.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Find a Caregiver" header navigation link.
Accessible via the "Find a Caregiver" footer link.
Query parameters (zip, radius, filters) can be used to deep-link into a pre-filtered caregiver search.

pages.name: Book a Visit
pages.description: Main booking interface for scheduling one-time or short-term home visits with nurses or caregivers. Users select a service, date, visit duration, and required specialization, then review and choose from a list of available time slots.
primary_functions: Let users select a visit type or service category (e.g., Post-Surgery Care) and specify a date (e.g., March 20, 2026)
Allow users to choose visit duration (e.g., 2 hours) and required specializations or skills (e.g., wound care)
Search for available nurses and time slots that match the chosen service, date, duration, and specialization
Display a list of available time slots, ordered chronologically, and allow users to select the earliest suitable time slot to proceed

incoming_params.description: Optional service_type code (e.g., 'post_surgery_care') to preselect the service in the booking form.
Optional CareService id to preselect a specific bookable service.
Optional visit date in YYYY-MM-DD format to prefill the date picker.
Optional visit duration in minutes (e.g., 120 for a 2-hour visit).
Optional specialization code (e.g., 'wound_care') to preselect the required skill.
Optional dementia CarePlan id passed when continuing from a selected package, for display in the booking context.
Optional start date for a dementia package; can be echoed in booking notes.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a chosen available time slot followed by a CTA such as "Continue" or "Book as Guest".

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Book a Visit" header navigation link.
Linked from Home and other pages via primary booking CTAs.
Accepts optional parameters to preconfigure service, date, duration, and specialization when deep-linked.

pages.name: Guest Booking & Confirmation
pages.description: Page for finalizing a chosen visit time as a guest user and displaying booking confirmation. Summarizes the selected visit and collects essential contact details to confirm the booking.
primary_functions: Summarize the selected service, nurse (if applicable), date, and time slot chosen on the booking page
Allow users to proceed as a guest via a 'Book as Guest' or 'Continue without account' option
Collect essential contact details (e.g., name, phone, email) required to confirm the visit
Submit the booking and display an on-page confirmation with booking number and visit details

incoming_params.description: Optional booking mode indicator, typically 'guest', controlling copy and flow emphasis.
Optional confirmation/booking id used when reloading a confirmed booking to show its details.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a link such as "Manage this booking" from the on-page confirmation state.
Click a link or button such as "Back to Home" after confirmation.

access_methods.description: Reached after selecting a time slot on the Book a Visit page and choosing to book as guest.
May be re-opened directly with a 'bookingId' parameter to display an existing confirmation.

pages.name: Manage Bookings
pages.description: Self-service tool for looking up, viewing, and modifying existing home visit bookings using a confirmation number and last name. Supports rescheduling by selecting a new date and time from available options.
primary_functions: Provide a booking lookup form where users enter confirmation/booking number and last name (e.g., HN123456 and Morgan)
Display the details of the located booking including service, date, time, and caregiver/nurse
Offer a 'Reschedule' option that opens a rescheduling interface with a date picker and available time slots
Allow users to change the visit to a new date and time (e.g., March 8, 2026 at 10:00 AM) and confirm the reschedule on the same page

incoming_params.description: Optional confirmation number to prefill the lookup form.
Optional client last name to prefill the lookup form.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Need help?" or "Contact support" link if the booking cannot be found or rescheduled.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Manage Bookings" header navigation link.
Booking details and reschedule options appear after submitting the lookup form.
Can be opened with bookingId/lastName params prefilled from a confirmation link.

pages.name: Care Needs Assessment
pages.description: Interactive questionnaire that guides users through a short series of questions about their care needs. After submitting responses, the page shows recommended services and enables scheduling of a follow-up phone consultation via an embedded scheduler.
primary_functions: Guide users through key questions about care needs (e.g., frequency of help, main concern, mobility level) and capture their answers
Generate and display recommended services and care options based on the assessment responses
Provide a clear call-to-action to 'Schedule a Phone Consultation' from the recommendations view
Embed a consultation scheduler on the same page where users pick a date (e.g., March 10, 2026) and time (e.g., 3:00 PM) and confirm the phone consultation

incoming_params.description: Optional flag (e.g., 'true') indicating that the assessment quiz should begin immediately on page load.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Learn more" link for a recommended service category.
Click a CTA such as "Book this recommended service" from the recommendations section.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Get Recommendations" header navigation link.
Accessible from homepage banners and CTAs inviting users to start the assessment.
Recommendations and consultation scheduling become available after submitting the assessment responses.

pages.name: Resources & Blog
pages.description: Central library of articles, guides, and educational content about home care, safety, and caregiving. Users can filter by category and time period, sort by recency or popularity, and navigate to full article detail pages.
primary_functions: List articles and resources with titles, summaries, categories/tags, and publish dates
Allow users to filter by category or tag (e.g., 'Safety & Fall Prevention') and by date range (e.g., 'Last 12 months')
Provide a sort dropdown (e.g., Most Recent, Most Popular/Most Read) to reorder the article list
Link to individual article detail pages for full content reading

incoming_params.description: Optional category slug (e.g., 'safety-fall-prevention') used to preselect a category filter.
Optional date range code such as 'last_12_months' or 'all_time'.
Optional sort order code such as 'most_recent' or 'most_popular'.
Optional search query term to prefill the resources search bar.
Optional view mode such as 'saved' to focus on saved/bookmarked articles.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click an article card in the resources list.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Resources" header navigation link.
Accessible via the "Resources & Blog" footer link.
Supports category, dateRange, sort, query, and view parameters for deep-linkable resource views.

pages.name: Article Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a single article or resource. Displays the full content of an article and provides options to save/bookmark it and copy a shareable link, as well as suggestions for related resources.
primary_functions: Display full article content including title, author, publish date, and body text
Allow users to save or bookmark the article to their personal saved resources collection
Provide a share toolbar with options including a 'Copy Link' or 'Copy URL' button that copies a shareable link to the clipboard
Suggest related articles, especially within the same category (e.g., other fall-prevention resources)

incoming_params.description: Article slug used to load the full article content.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Back to category" or "More in this topic" link near the article header.
Click a related article card at the end of the article.

access_methods.description: Accessed via an article-specific URL containing the 'slug' query parameter.
Linked from Resources, the Home page, and other articles' related-content sections.

pages.name: Care Cost Estimator
pages.description: Configurable tool for building a custom weekly care plan and estimating its cost before requesting a personalized estimate. Users add services, specify weekly hours, adjust to stay within budget, and then submit their contact details.
primary_functions: Let users add multiple services (e.g., Personal Care, Medication Reminders, Household Support) and specify hours per week for each
Automatically calculate and display the total estimated weekly cost, updating as hours are adjusted
Help users adjust service hours (e.g., reducing Household Support hours) to keep the weekly estimate under a target budget (e.g., $700)
Provide a follow-up contact details step on the same page where users enter name, email, and phone, then submit an estimate request and see a confirmation

incoming_params.description: Optional preset configuration key (e.g., 'light_support', '10hr_week') used to initialize the estimator with common combinations.
Optional target weekly budget used to guide adjustments (e.g., 700).

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Cost Estimator" header navigation link.
Linked from Home, Services Overview, and relevant service detail pages.
Estimate request confirmation is shown after submitting contact details.

pages.name: About Us
pages.description: Background information about the home nursing care provider, including mission, values, team credentials, and accreditations. Designed to build trust and convey professionalism to prospective clients and families.
primary_functions: Explain the organizations mission, values, and approach to home nursing care
Highlight team credentials, experience, and any accreditations or licenses
Build trust with potential clients through testimonials, history, and quality assurances

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Contact our team" link or CTA within the About Us content.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "About Us" footer link.
Accessible via direct bookmark to about.html.

pages.name: Contact Us
pages.description: Central place for users to reach out with questions, special requests, or support needs. Provides phone and email contact details, physical address, urgent-care guidance, and a general inquiry form.
primary_functions: Display contact information such as phone numbers, email addresses, and mailing address
Provide a contact form for general inquiries or non-urgent support requests
Offer guidance on which contact channel to use for urgent care versus general questions

incoming_params.description: Optional subject text used to prefill the contact form subject field.
Optional inquiry type (e.g., 'booking_support', 'general_question') used to preselect a form option.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Contact" header navigation link.
Accessible via the "Contact Us" footer link.
Form submission shows an inline confirmation message after calling submitContactInquiry.

pages.name: FAQs
pages.description: Frequently asked questions about services, pricing, booking, and care logistics. Organized into sections to help users quickly find answers about how home care works and how to use the website tools.
primary_functions: Answer common questions about how home nursing care works, what services include, and typical visit patterns
Clarify pricing concepts, estimators, and how to request specific plans or packages
Explain how to use key tools on the website, such as booking visits, managing bookings, and finding caregivers

incoming_params.description: Optional section identifier (e.g., 'pricing', 'booking', 'services') used to auto-expand a specific FAQ group.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Still need help? Contact us" link at the end of the FAQs.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "FAQs" footer link.
Accessible via direct link to faq.html.
The 'section' query parameter can highlight a relevant FAQ section based on referring page.

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Legal and compliance information describing how personal and health-related data is collected, used, stored, and protected. Includes details on user rights and data-access requests.
primary_functions: Explain what personal information is collected and for what purposes
Describe how data is stored, protected, and shared, especially for sensitive health-related details
Inform users of their rights regarding their data and how to exercise those rights

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Privacy Policy" footer link.
Can be opened directly via privacy.html for legal references or policy updates.

pages.name: Terms of Service
pages.description: Legal terms governing the use of the website and services. Covers permitted use, limitations of liability, booking and cancellation policies, and other conditions.
primary_functions: Define the conditions under which users may access and use the website and its services
Outline limitations of liability, disclaimers, and user responsibilities
Describe policies related to bookings, cancellations, and service modifications

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Terms of Service" footer link.
Can be accessed directly via terms.html for contract and policy references.

header_links.description: Search and filter caregivers near you
Schedule a one-time or short-term home visit
Start a care needs assessment and get recommendations
Estimate the cost of a custom weekly care plan
Educational articles and guides on home care and safety
Look up and reschedule existing visits
Get in touch with the care team

footer_links.description: Learn more about the organization and team
Frequently asked questions about services and booking
List of all available home nursing care services
Details and plans for Overnight Care services
Details and packages for Memory & Dementia Care
Search for caregivers by location and filters
Browse articles, guides, and safety resources
Information on data collection and privacy
Legal terms for using the website and services
